narrative: AI compute platform and data-center acceleration
growth_evidence: Data center demand keeps pulling forward accelerator, networking, and software attach.
catalysts: Blackwell ramp, sovereign AI, networking attach
invalidation: Hyperscaler capex digestion or margin compression
buy_plan: Add only after earnings confirms demand and valuation cools on volatility.

narrative: Autonomy, EV scale, energy storage, and robot optionality
growth_evidence: Energy storage growth offsets EV pricing pressure while autonomy narrative remains unresolved.
catalysts: FSD milestones, energy deployments, lower-cost vehicle
invalidation: EV gross margin fails to stabilize or autonomy slips without evidence
buy_plan: Build slowly; require operating margin stabilization.

growth_evidence: Flash demand can benefit from AI storage growth and cyclical pricing recovery.
catalysts: NAND price recovery, enterprise SSD demand
invalidation: Memory oversupply returns before cash flow improves
buy_plan: Treat as cyclical; size smaller than platform names.

narrative: AI operating system for government and enterprise workflows
growth_evidence: AIP adoption supports revenue acceleration and high software margins.
invalidation: AIP pilots fail to convert into durable expansion
buy_plan: Research candidate after revenue acceleration persists for two quarters.

narrative: Second-source AI accelerator and CPU platform
growth_evidence: AI GPU ramp can add a new growth leg while server CPU share remains relevant.
catalysts: MI-series traction, server CPU share, margin expansion
invalidation: AI accelerator share stays niche and margins dilute
buy_plan: Use pullbacks; watch execution versus NVIDIA ecosystem.

narrative: AI networking, custom silicon, and infrastructure software
growth_evidence: Custom ASIC and networking demand create AI infrastructure exposure with cash flow support.
catalysts: Custom silicon wins, VMware cash extraction
invalidation: Integration drag or AI order lumpiness

tags: foundry; advanced nodes; AI supply chain

catalysts: N2 ramp, advanced packaging, capex discipline

narrative: Power-efficient compute IP across mobile, cloud, and edge AI
growth_evidence: Royalty model can participate in broader chip volume without fab risk.

narrative: Voice AI interface layer for physical-world workflows
growth_evidence: Restaurant and automotive deployments offer operating leverage if retention holds.

growth_evidence: Demand for specialized AI cloud can grow quickly if utilization and funding remain strong.
